description: Kafka consumer/producer performance, Spring listener latency, MongoDB command latency, consumer lag, consumer throughput, producer error rate, and processing activity.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="dlq"} |= "Failed job persisted to DLQ repository" [$__range]))

panels.title: Consumer Lag by Topic — Current & Max
Kafka Listener Processing Rate (job-worker, records/s processed)
Kafka Listener Mean Latency — All Consumers
Kafka Consumer Bytes Consumed Rate — All Services
MongoDB Commands/s by Operation (Success vs Failed)

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job="dlq"} |= "Failed job persisted to DLQ repository" [$__interval]))

panels.title: Job Flow: Produced vs Worker Consumed vs DLQ
panels.description: Compares the rate of jobs published by job-producer with the rate consumed by job-worker (first attempt + retries) and the rate landing in the DLQ. A rising DLQ line or growing gap between produced and consumed indicates a problem.

targets.expr: {job=~"job-worker|dlq|retry-dispatcher"} |~ "(Consuming message|Job processed successfully|Job processing failed|Failed job persisted|Job requeued successfully|Failed to requeue|Failed to persist DLQ)"

title: Chrono Queue — Kafka & MongoDB
